name: TERNIUM ARGENTINA SOCIEDAD ANON
summary: Ternium Argentina S.A. manufactures and distributes steel products in Argentina. The company’s product portfolio includes slabs, billets, bars, wire rods, hot-rolled and cold-rolled coils and sheets, hot-dipped galvanized and pre-painted sheets, welded pipes, and sections. Ternium Argentina is headquartered in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
